channel.title: The Morning Bloom
channel.description: Daily news briefing — AI & Technology, IT Industry, Recruitment & HR. Pune Edition.

item.title: The Morning Bloom — Tuesday, July 21, 2026
item.description: AI's Wall Street moment: OpenAI & Anthropic eye IPOs · AMD's Helios lands Microsoft in strike at Nvidia · Silicon supply side: Alphabet's leaner chip, TSMC's $265B Arizona bet · Europe's AI Act bares its teeth as GPAI rules take hold · Enterprise AI's reality check: everyone deploys, few cash in · The open-weight frontier closes the gap — in Chinese · IT budgets hit $6.31T as the data-center boom eats the forecast · In 2026, attackers don't break in — they log in · Tech hiring's great divergence: AI roles soar, market shrinks · The machines are reading your résumé — and interviewing you · India's fresher windows open — against a skills gap
